144.derived_from: Coset action on PSL2(11) ⊂ M12 (computed deterministically from M12G1-p12aB0 generators).

220.derived_from: Induced action on 3-subsets of the 12-point permrep (M12G1-p12aB0).

495.derived_from: Induced action on 4-subsets of the 12-point permrep (M12G1-p12aB0).

sources.title: Wikipedia: Mathieu group M12 (Maximal subgroups table: indices give transitive coset actions)

ATLAS of Group Representations: M12 — permutation representation on 66 points (rank 3, suborbits)
Derived: induced actions on k-subsets (k=3,4) from the 12-point permrep generators

notes: Transitive permutation degrees from indices of maximal subgroups (coset actions). Stored for offline, deterministic checks.
